Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /Users/ertugrulsahin/Codalio/demo-project-v4/booking-app/gems/rhino-rails-4.5.0/lib/rhino/controllers/resources_controller.rb:
   110	        record = builder.to_scope.first!
   111	      end
   112	
   113	      render json: serialize_record(record)
   114	    end
   115	
   116	    # PUT /api/{slug}/:id
   117	    def update
   118	      record = find_record
   119	      authorize record, :update?, policy_class: policy_for(record)
   120	
   121	      data = params_hash
   122	
   123	      # Reject organization_id changes — cross-tenant reassignment is not allowed
   124	      if current_organization && data.key?("organization_id")
   125	        return render json: {
   126	          message: "You are not allowed to change the organization_id."
   127	        }, status: :forbidden
   128	      end
   129	
   130	      permitted_fields = resolve_permitted_fields(current_user, "update")
   131	
   132	      # Check for forbidden fields → 403
   133	      forbidden = find_forbidden_fields(data, permitted_fields)
   134	      if forbidden.any?
   135	        return render json: {
   136	          message: "You are not allowed to set the following field(s): #{forbidden.join(', ')}"
   137	        }, status: :forbidden
   138	      end
   139	
   140	      model_instance = model_class.new
   141	      validation = model_instance.validate_for_action(
   142	        data, permitted_fields: permitted_fields, organization: current_organization
   143	      )
   144	
   145	      unless validation[:valid]
